subject: feat(import): add manual tag input to classify step
body:
Users could only accept/dismiss ML suggestions during import — if the ML
didn't suggest the right tag, they were stuck. Now each group card has a
"+ Tag" button that reveals an inline input with autocomplete from existing
patterns and other groups' tags. Tags are also removable with an X button.

Tags: import, tags, ux, autocomplete
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dashboard-polish
Semver: minor
